text_original: decent when it works. do me a favor and don't bother with the plus. the "long" option doesn't work. the extended memory is barely longer. the pinned memory doesn't work. overall the premium is a waste of money. added a star because as other apps turn worse this one is better just for that.
text_zh: 能用的时候还行。帮个忙，别费劲买 Plus 版了。“长文本”选项没用，扩展内存几乎没长多少，置顶记忆功能也不起作用。总的来说，高级版纯属浪费钱。多给了一颗星，是因为随着其他应用变得越来越烂，仅凭这一点这个应用就显得好一些了。
reply_original: Hi! I'm sorry the Pro features didn't meet your expectations. We just launched a Memory Service upgrade to improve long-term retention. Regarding Pinned Memory, please ensure you've added key details in the Memory module. We'd love to fix this for you! Please email your UID and details to support@fantachat.ai so our devs can investigate.
reply_zh: 嗨！很抱歉 Pro 功能未能达到您的预期。我们刚刚推出了记忆服务升级，以提升长期记忆能力。关于“置顶记忆”，请确保您已在记忆模块中添加了关键详情。我们非常希望能为您解决这个问题！请将您的 UID 和具体情况发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们的开发人员进行调查。
